creator: volker@vwsoft.com
text:
Harry, Alex,

please try the following patch against /usr/src/sys/dev/drm/drm_pciids.h
and recompile + reinstall kernel. After rebooting and starting X, the
device might have the chance to get recognized. I'm pretty quite unsure
about the chipset used so this patch has been created by guessing
wildly. This patch is a modified patch taken from the NetBSD project.

Please test and provide feedback.

Thanks!
